---
title: "My Garden"
description: "Intro to Gardening"
author: "Jason Cook"
date: "2026-03-24"
categories: [Skills, Gardening]
---

My yard is huge. I mean, it's pretty big. I live on about a 1/6 of an acre property, but my house is only 750 sq ft, so it's big back there. For the first 9 months of living there, we didn't really take care of the yard, so this last 2-3 months I've been grinding trying to clean it up, and now we have some uncovered beds that were under a bunch of tall grass.

![Garden Beds (Newly Exposed)](images/Beds.jpg){width="60%"}

![Other Angle](images/Beds2.jpg){width="60%"}

These are working quite well. I have planted kale, spinach, and arugula in them as of a week ago and they are all starting to sprout! This is the first gardening I've ever done. Here are the updated pictures as of today:

![Arugula](images/Arugula.png){width="60%"}

![Spinach](images/Spinach.png){width="60%"}

![Kale (these guys are barely starting to show)](images/Kale.png){width="60%"}

I hope to be updating this as I grow stuff. It has been fun and rewarding to see it actually growing.
